ItemOperations_patchItem.usage:
val request = ItemPatchRequest(
    item = ItemPatchRequestItem(
        name = "example",
        description = "example",
        priority = 123
    )
)
client.items.patchItem(id = 123, request = request)
ItemOperations_patchItem.output: Item(id: Int, name: String, description: String?, priority: Int?)
